title: Dripping Savory Slovakian Cheese Bowl
description: A rich fusion of melted Bryndza cheese and sourdough croutons served in a scorching stone bowl topped with a savory umami caramel sauce.
instructions: Place a stone dolsot bowl on the stove over medium-high heat for ten minutes until it is scorching hot.
Melt the sugar in a small saucepan over medium heat until it turns a deep amber color.
Whisk in the butter and soy sauce to the melted sugar to create a savory caramel liquid.
Toss the sourdough cubes into the preheated stone bowl to toast them against the hot surface.
Whisk the Bryndza cheese and heavy cream together in a small bowl until a thick paste forms.
Spread the cheese mixture over the toasted bread cubes inside the stone bowl.
Allow the residual heat of the stone bowl to melt the cheese until it begins to bubble and drip.
Drizzle the savory caramel sauce over the gooey cheese layer immediately.
Garnish the dish with minced garlic and fresh dill before serving directly in the stone bowl.
